issues.description: SearchDeck is incorrect for this effect. The card requires looking at top 4 cards, revealing up to 1 Cross Guild card, and adding it to hand, then placing rest at bottom. This is a multi-step effect: (1) look at cards, (2) conditional reveal/add, (3) reorder remainder. SearchDeck typically searches entire deck. This should use a custom reveal/filter mechanism or multiple actions.
Filter is ByCost with maxCost:4, which is completely wrong. The effect requires filtering by TYPE (Cross Guild), not by cost. Should be {"kind":"ByType","type":"Cross Guild"} or similar.
Missing the constraint that only UP TO 1 card can be added (not all matching cards). Filter should enforce maxCount:1.
Effect does not reflect that cards are drawn from TOP 4 of deck specifically, nor that remaining cards are placed at BOTTOM in any order. Current DSL loses this positioning requirement.
